title: quercus diversifolia
intro: Quercus diversifolia, also known as the evergreen oak or Japanese evergreen oak, is a species of tree in the family Fagaceae, native to East Asia, specifically in China, Japan, and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. The leaves of the Quercus diversifolia plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
